content.query:
let trend = 
    NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog'
    and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
    | make-series TrendLine = count() on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to {TimeRange:end} step {TimeRange:grain} by DestPort;
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog'
    and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| summarize PortConnectionCount = count() by DestPort
| join (trend) on DestPort
| extend DestPort = strcat("Port: ", tostring(DestPort))
| top 10 by PortConnectionCount
| sort by PortConnectionCount desc
content.title: TopPorts

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp       = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend SourceIp        = coalesce(tostring(SrcIp), "")
| extend DestinationIp   = coalesce(tostring(DestIp), "")
| extend SourcePort      = tostring(SrcPorts)
| extend DestinationPort = tostring(DestPort)
| extend Direction = case(tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Inbound", "IN", tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Outbound", "OUT", tostring(FlowDirection))
| extend Action    = case(tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Allowed", "PASS", tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Denied", "DROP", tostring(FlowStatus))
| extend Protocol  = case(tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "T", "TCP", tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "U", "UDP", tostring(L4Protocol))
| extend RuleId    = tostring(AclRule)
| where RuleId contains "{RuleId}"
| where Action contains "{Action}"
| where Direction contains "{Direction}"
| where DestinationPort contains "{DestinationPort}"
| project Timestamp, SourceIp, SourcePort, DestinationIp, DestinationPort, Direction, RuleId, Action
| summarize count() by Action, bin(Timestamp, {TimeRange:grain})

NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp       = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| where isnotempty(SrcTuple) and isnotempty(DestTuple)
| extend SrcFields  = split(SrcTuple,  "|")
| extend DestFields = split(DestTuple, "|")
| extend SourceIp        = tostring(SrcFields[0])
| extend DestinationIp   = tostring(DestFields[0])
| extend SourcePort      = tostring(SrcPorts)
| extend DestinationPort = tostring(DestPort)
| extend Direction = case(tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Inbound", "IN", tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Outbound", "OUT", tostring(FlowDirection))
| extend Action    = case(tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Allowed", "PASS", tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Denied", "DROP", tostring(FlowStatus))
| extend Protocol  = case(tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "T", "TCP", tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "U", "UDP", tostring(L4Protocol))
| extend RuleId    = tostring(AclRule)
| extend Id        = tostring(FlowLogResourceId)
| extend INET      = iff(tostring(FlowType) in~ ("ExternalPublic", "AzurePublic"), "INET", tostring(FlowType))
| extend Reason    = coalesce(tostring(Description), "")
| where RuleId contains "{RuleId}"
| where SourceIp has "{SourceIp}"
| where Action contains "{Action}"
| where DestinationIp has "{DestinationIp}"
| where DestinationPort contains "{DestinationPort}"
| project Timestamp, Id, Action, RuleId, Direction, Protocol, SourceIp, SourcePort, DestinationIp, DestinationPort, IpFanout, Extra = "View More"
| sort by Timestamp desc
| take 1000

NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend SrcTuples = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps), split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                          isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                          dynamic([]))
| mv-expand SrcTuple = SrcTuples to typeof(string)
| where isnotempty(SrcTuple)
| extend SourceIp = tostring(split(SrcTuple, "|")[0])
| where SourceIp contains "{SourceIp}"
| summarize count() by SourceIp, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
content.title: Count by Source Ip Over Time

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp  = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| where isnotempty(DestTuple)
| extend DestinationIp = tostring(split(DestTuple, "|")[0])
| where DestinationIp contains "{DestinationIp}"
| summarize count() by DestinationIp, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
content.title: Count of Destination Ip Over Time

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp = TimeGenerated
| extend RuleId = tostring(AclRule)
| where RuleId contains "{RuleId}"
| summarize count() by RuleId, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
content.title: Count of Rule Id Over Time

parameters.name: ConnectionsFilter
parameters.label: Connections Filters
parameters.description: Select either SourceIp or DestinationIp to filter the dropped connections visualization

parameters.name: TileFilter
parameters.description: Select a filter for the tile visualizations.

parameters.name: MapFilter
parameters.description: Select a filter for the map visualization

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp       = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend SourcePort      = tostring(SrcPorts)
| extend DestinationPort = tostring(DestPort)
| extend Direction = case(tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Inbound", "IN", tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Outbound", "OUT", tostring(FlowDirection))
| extend Action    = case(tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Allowed", "PASS", tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Denied", "DROP", tostring(FlowStatus))
| extend Protocol  = case(tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "T", "TCP", tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "U", "UDP", tostring(L4Protocol))
| extend RuleId    = tostring(AclRule)
| where Action == "DROP"
| extend SelectedTuples = case(
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp",                                     dynamic([]),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp",                                dynamic([]),
    pack_array("__nonip__")
)
| mv-expand SelectedTuple = SelectedTuples to typeof(string)
| extend SourceIp      = iff("{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp",      tostring(split(SelectedTuple, "|")[0]), coalesce(tostring(SrcIp), ""))
| extend DestinationIp = iff("{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp", tostring(split(SelectedTuple, "|")[0]), coalesce(tostring(DestIp), ""))
| summarize FailureCount = count() by {ConnectionsFilter}
| top 10 by FailureCount
content.title: Top 10 Dropped Connections by {ConnectionsFilter}

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp       = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend SourcePort      = tostring(SrcPorts)
| extend DestinationPort = tostring(DestPort)
| extend Direction = case(tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Inbound", "IN", tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Outbound", "OUT", tostring(FlowDirection))
| extend Action    = case(tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Allowed", "PASS", tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Denied", "DROP", tostring(FlowStatus))
| extend Protocol  = case(tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "T", "TCP", tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "U", "UDP", tostring(L4Protocol))
| extend RuleId    = tostring(AclRule)
| where Action == "PASS"
| extend SelectedTuples = case(
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp",                                     dynamic([]),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp",                                dynamic([]),
    pack_array("__nonip__")
)
| mv-expand SelectedTuple = SelectedTuples to typeof(string)
| extend SourceIp      = iff("{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp",      tostring(split(SelectedTuple, "|")[0]), coalesce(tostring(SrcIp), ""))
| extend DestinationIp = iff("{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp", tostring(split(SelectedTuple, "|")[0]), coalesce(tostring(DestIp), ""))
| summarize SuccessCount = count() by {ConnectionsFilter}
| top 10 by SuccessCount
content.title: Top 10 Successful Connections by {ConnectionsFilter}

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Timestamp       = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend SourcePort      = tostring(SrcPorts)
| extend DestinationPort = tostring(DestPort)
| extend Direction = case(tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Inbound", "IN", tostring(FlowDirection) =~ "Outbound", "OUT", tostring(FlowDirection))
| extend Action    = case(tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Allowed", "PASS", tostring(FlowStatus) =~ "Denied", "DROP", tostring(FlowStatus))
| extend Protocol  = case(tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "T", "TCP", tostring(L4Protocol) =~ "U", "UDP", tostring(L4Protocol))
| extend RuleId    = tostring(AclRule)
| extend SelectedTuples = case(
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp",                                     dynamic([]),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
    "{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp",                                dynamic([]),
    pack_array("__nonip__")
)
| mv-expand SelectedTuple = SelectedTuples to typeof(string)
| extend SourceIp      = iff("{ConnectionsFilter}" == "SourceIp",      tostring(split(SelectedTuple, "|")[0]), coalesce(tostring(SrcIp), ""))
| extend DestinationIp = iff("{ConnectionsFilter}" == "DestinationIp", tostring(split(SelectedTuple, "|")[0]), coalesce(tostring(DestIp), ""))
| summarize Count = count() by {ConnectionsFilter}
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Top 10 Count by {ConnectionsFilter}
Protocol / Direction Count & Over Time

content.query:
// DestPublicIps/SrcPublicIps are space-separated pipe-delimited tuples:
//   IP|flowsStarted|flowsTerminated|packetsSrcToDest|packetsDestToSrc|bytesSrcToDest|bytesDestToSrc
// Strategy: split on space → mv-expand one row per IP → parse 7 fields → geo_info → aggregate by City
let Base =
    NTANetAnalytics
    | where SubType == "FlowLog" and FaSchemaVersion == "3"
    | extend Timestamp = coalesce(FlowIntervalStartTime, TimeGenerated)
    | where Timestamp between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end});
let Expanded =
    Base
    // Select the tuple array based on MapFilter; fall back to DestPublicIps for Country/AzureRegion
    | extend TupleArray = case(
        "{MapFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
        "{MapFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
        "{MapFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
        "{MapFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
        isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),  // Country/AzureRegion fallback
        dynamic([])
    )
    // One row per space-separated tuple entry
    | mv-expand TupleEntry = TupleArray to typeof(string)
    | where isnotempty(TupleEntry)
    // Parse all 7 pipe-delimited fields from each tuple
    | extend Fields          = split(TupleEntry, "|")
    | extend CandidateIp     = tostring(Fields[0])
    | extend FlowsStarted    = tolong(coalesce(Fields[1], "0"))
    | extend FlowsTerminated = tolong(coalesce(Fields[2], "0"))
    | extend PktsSrcToDest   = tolong(coalesce(Fields[3], "0"))
    | extend PktsDestToSrc   = tolong(coalesce(Fields[4], "0"))
    | extend BytesSrcToDest  = tolong(coalesce(Fields[5], "0"))
    | extend BytesDestToSrc  = tolong(coalesce(Fields[6], "0"))
    | where isnotempty(CandidateIp)
    | where not(ipv4_is_private(CandidateIp));
Expanded
| extend Location  = geo_info_from_ip_address(CandidateIp)
| extend Latitude  = todouble(Location.latitude)
| extend Longitude = todouble(Location.longitude)
| extend City      = iff(isempty(tostring(Location.city)), "Unknown City", tostring(Location.city))
// Sum real per-tuple traffic metrics; aggregate to one row per city for the map
| summarize
    FlowsStarted     = sum(FlowsStarted),
    FlowsTerminated  = sum(FlowsTerminated),
    PacketsSrcToDest = sum(PktsSrcToDest),
    PacketsDestToSrc = sum(PktsDestToSrc),
    BytesSrcToDest   = sum(BytesSrcToDest),
    BytesDestToSrc   = sum(BytesDestToSrc),
    UniqueIpCount    = dcount(CandidateIp),
    Latitude         = avg(Latitude),
    Longitude        = avg(Longitude)
  by City
| extend TotalFlows   = FlowsStarted + FlowsTerminated
| extend TotalBytes   = BytesSrcToDest + BytesDestToSrc
| extend TotalPackets = PacketsSrcToDest + PacketsDestToSrc
| project City, Latitude, Longitude, UniqueIpCount, TotalFlows, TotalBytes, TotalPackets,
          FlowsStarted, FlowsTerminated, PacketsSrcToDest, PacketsDestToSrc, BytesSrcToDest, BytesDestToSrc
| sort by TotalFlows desc
content.title: Count of {MapFilter} by City
